tested_outcome: Production-ready second pass. First diagram attempt was too busy/architectural. Second pass with 'simple/instantly readable' framing landed — diagram explained the product while keeping the dark urgency mood.
key_pivot_from_warm_variant: The hero swaps from wallet (emotional pain) to house diagram (product explainer). For COLD audiences who don't yet know what ducted A/C is, the diagram does the explainer work alongside the offer.
composition_choices_that_worked: Specified diagram must read as a HOUSE with airflow in HALF A SECOND — not require parsing
Used 'product illustration' framing (Apple-style diagrams) NOT 'architectural render'
Said 'minimal interior detail — just enough to communicate rooms, not full furnished interiors'
Solution line changed from 'DUCTED A/C, FULLY INSTALLED' to 'WHOLE-HOME DUCTED A/C, FULLY INSTALLED' — reinforces what the diagram is showing
Lime/black palette emerged from the AI — aggressive without being clichéd red/black
what_failed_first_time_and_was_fixed: First attempt: 'high-end real-estate render, not engineering schematic' overcorrected into busy architectural visualisation
Fix: explicitly forbade photorealistic/architectural/cartoon styles, demanded simple-illustration-with-airflow
Lesson: when describing illustration style, give explicit positive AND negative examples
full_prompt_used:
Use the attached image as a strong style and layout reference. Match its visual energy, density, and direct-response feel — but DO NOT copy its headline, hero visual, or specific colours. Generate fresh ones per the brief below.

Create a square 1080×1080 social media ad for a residential ducted air conditioning installer in Brisbane, Australia.

FUNNEL CONTEXT
This ad is for a colder audience who may not yet fully understand what ducted A/C is. The visual must do explainer work alongside the offer. The hero must clearly and INSTANTLY show ducted A/C as a whole-home system — readable in half a second, not requiring inspection.

MOOD & STYLE
Bold, dark, urgent, problem-led. Choose a fresh dark high-contrast palette of your own with one strong accent colour for the solution/price elements. Aggressive bold display typography for the headline. All text must be unmissable at thumbnail size. Direct-response, slightly aggressive, professional.

LAYOUT (top to bottom)

1. HEADLINE — top third
Two parts:
   - "DREADING YOUR NEXT" medium-weight uppercase
   - "POWER BILL?" oversized bold uppercase in a contrasting accent colour — dominant
Stack across two lines.

2. HERO VISUAL — middle, roughly 45% of canvas height
A clean, simplified, stylised 3D illustration of a single-storey home, viewed at a slight 3/4 angle. The house is rendered as a simplified geometric form — clear walls, clear roof, easily readable at thumbnail size. The front wall is transparent or removed, revealing 3-4 simplified rooms inside. Each room has a visible ceiling vent with a soft coloured airflow arrow pointing down into the room — use cool blue or white arrows for cooling. The style should feel like a premium product illustration (think Apple-style product diagrams or modern infographic illustration) — NOT a photorealistic architectural render, NOT a technical engineering diagram, NOT a cartoon. Clean, minimal interior detail — just enough to communicate "rooms," not full furnished interiors. The whole illustration should read as a single clean object, not a busy scene.

3. SOLUTION PANEL — right side or below the hero
Vertical solid-colour accent panel:
   - Small uppercase caps: "THE ANSWER:"
   - Medium uppercase: "WHOLE-HOME DUCTED A/C, FULLY INSTALLED"
   - Above the price, smaller, struck through: "WAS $9,990"
   - Oversized bold dominant: "$5,799"

4. CTA BUTTON — beneath the solution panel
Rounded pill button reading: "LOCK IN YOUR PRICE"
Bold uppercase. High-contrast colour.

5. DISCOUNT BADGE — bottom-left or top-right corner
Circular burst badge reading: "40% OFF"
Bold contrasting colour, slightly tilted.

6. URGENCY LINE — small text under the CTA
Italic text: "Hurry — Limited Slots"

7. BRAND STRIP — very bottom edge
Thin horizontal strip with three brand logos evenly spaced and rendered in their native brand colours: Daikin, Mitsubishi Heavy Industries, Samsung.

HARD RULES
- 1080×1080 aspect ratio
- All text readable at thumbnail size
- The house illustration must be SIMPLE and INSTANTLY READABLE — if a viewer needs more than half a second, the visual has failed
- Do NOT render furnished interiors in detail
- Do NOT make the house look like a construction site or technical schematic
- Maximum 3 brand logos
- Do NOT include "0% interest" or "interest-free"
- Do NOT add people, faces, or hands
- Anchor price visibly struck through
lessons_for_layer_2: When a single archetype serves both cold and warm audiences, build TWO variants — different visual hero, different solution wording, same offer
For diagram heroes generated fresh by AI, use 'product illustration' framing not 'render' or 'architectural' — those words push the AI wrong
Always include explicit negative examples ('NOT photorealistic, NOT architectural render, NOT cartoon') — the AI needs to know what to avoid, not just what to make
Funnel-stage context at the top of the prompt actually changes how the AI composes — worth keeping there
